/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_geometry_clear.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_geometry_clear.dir/src/geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_geometry_clear.dir/src/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_geometry_clear.dir/tests/test_geometry_clear.cpp.o -o test_geometry_clear  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.5.0 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.5.0 -fopenmp /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.5.0 -fopenmp -ldl /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
